resources.string: The Kalaniketan institution was founded in the year 1947 in Jabalpur with the vision to develop competent Technical Skill and Education in state of M.P. Government Polytechnic was established in the year 1955. Afterwards, in 1993, The Kalaniketan Institution was merged in the Government Polytechnic institution and it was rechristened as Kalaniketan Polytechnic.

The Kalaniketan Polytechnic College is one of the leading institutions of M.P. It is affiliated to “Rajeev Gandhi Prodhyogiki Vishwavidhyalaya” and it is approved by AICTE. It is running several Diploma and Certificate courses according to the contemporary needs of Industries. Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Automobile Engineering, Printing, Computer science and Engineering, Information technology & Pharmacy.
Disclaimer: This Android app is developed by student as major project of 6 semester.This assumes no responsibility or liability for any error or omission in the content of this app.
